name: gh-724-completed-task-unapplied-deliverable
description: GH-283 task 3 declared deliverable 3.1.3 (banner renumber 'Phase 2 of 7' -> 'of 8' in pr_merged_check.js) but its verifier only grepped a different assertion, so the task completed with the deliverable unapplied. Task 4's gate then failed on the stray banner in a file outside task 4's scope — an unrecoverable downstream wedge.

expected.rationale: A promised deliverable inside the task's own scope is demonstrably absent from the diff; catching it at THIS boundary (retry with guidance) prevents the downstream out-of-scope wedge entirely.

provenance.notes: Contrast with gh-727: missing deliverable INSIDE scope -> retry; outside scope -> reopen-artifact. Version-skew note in the incident: installed cache 3.68.3 vs repo 3.74.2 (Phase 5 cache-skew check).
